title: Longest ZigZag Path in a Binary Tree
titleCn: 二叉树中的最长交错路径

testcases.input: root = [1,null,1,1,1,null,null,1,1,null,1,null,null,null,1] Output: 3 Explanation: Longest ZigZag path in blue nodes (right -> left -> right).
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Longest ZigZag path in blue nodes (right -> left -> right).

testcases.input: root = [1,1,1,null,1,null,null,1,1,null,1] Output: 4 Explanation: Longest ZigZag path in blue nodes (left -> right -> left -> right).
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Longest ZigZag path in blue nodes (left -> right -> left -> right).
